summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ADLTrack care tracking application. All core navigation, dashboard functionality, and responsive design features working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page renders correctly with hero section, navigation, and phone mockup
Navigation dropdown menus work (Log In and Get Started)
Successfully navigates to Family Portal from dropdown
Successfully navigates to Caregiver Dashboard from dropdown
Successfully navigates to Enterprise Dashboard from dropdown
Family Dashboard shows all required tabs: Overview, Vitals, Messages, Schedule
Caregiver Dashboard shows all required tabs: Tasks, Vitals, AI Copilot, Notes
Enterprise Dashboard shows all required tabs: Overview, Staff, Clients, Billing, Compliance
All tab switching works correctly on all dashboards
Back button on each dashboard returns to landing page
Hero CTA button navigates to Family Dashboard
Contact form fields are functional and submit button is clickable
Mobile responsive design works with mobile menu
Message input functionality works on mobile
